name: Racing Rampage
author: Poki
description: Racing Rampage is a chaotic racing game where every second is pure mayhem! Smash enemy cars, blow them up with bombs, and blast them with powerful guns. Jump off ramps, grab nitro boosts and rockets, and soar above the road while causing total destruction! Collect fuel to keep driving, earn cash to upgrade your car in the garage, and make it tougher, faster, and deadlier. How long can you survive the madness before you run out of gas? How to play Racing Rampage? Usw A/D or left/right arrow keys or joystick to play. Who created Racing Rampage? Racing Rampage is created by 9Lives Games. Play their other games on Poki: Blobby Clicker ! How can I play Racing Rampage for free? You can play Racing Rampage for free on Poki. Can I play Racing Rampage on mobile devices and desktop? Racing Rampage can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
